content.description: Participants of IPL AUCTION act as franchise owners and team managers who compete to build the best team within a fixed budget through strategic bidding. Team (2–3 Members) Round 1: Quiz related to Auctioning Round 2: IPL Auction Contact: BALAJI - 8610759728

rules.rule: No mobile phones or internet usage during the auction.
No discussion or collusion between teams while bidding.
Bidding must stop immediately once the auctioneer says “Sold”.
Teams cannot exceed the given budget at any point.
